# Varun Choraria

> Senior Manager, Marketing at GTM Buddy. Writer on B2B SaaS, go-to-market strategy, and the intersection of AI and human judgment in modern sales.

## About

Varun Choraria is a B2B SaaS marketing operator with over a decade of experience. He leads marketing at GTM Buddy, a Revenue Activation platform for B2B sales teams. He writes about go-to-market strategy, sales enablement, content, and the evolving role of AI in B2B revenue teams.

## Writing

- [/notes](/blog/) — longer essays on B2B marketing, GTM strategy, and AI in sales
- [/til](/til/) — short atomic notes and observations
